title: stream.query request

channel.description: Action-specific channel input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

position.description: Action-specific position input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

items.description: Known unsigned integer or SystemVerilog literal of arbitrary width; X/Z and 0x are rejected.

values.description: Ordered values entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

oneOf.description: Structured * configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

begin.description: Known unsigned integer or SystemVerilog literal of arbitrary width; X/Z and 0x are rejected.

end.description: Known unsigned integer or SystemVerilog literal of arbitrary width; X/Z and 0x are rejected.

oneOf.description: Structured * configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

value.description: Known unsigned integer or SystemVerilog literal of arbitrary width; X/Z and 0x are rejected.

mask.description: Known unsigned integer or SystemVerilog literal of arbitrary width; X/Z and 0x are rejected.

oneOf.description: Structured * configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined fields key.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: The property name is caller-defined; the value must follow this declared schema.

fields.description: Structured fields configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

filter.description: AND-combined Stream field filters; each field selects exact queue, inclusive range, or value/mask.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

packet_index.description: Action-specific packet_index input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

query.description: Action-specific query selector. Do not copy index, channel, or filter forms from another action.

stream.description: Action-specific stream input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

begin.description: Action-specific begin input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

end.description: Action-specific end input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_range.description: Closed analysis interval. begin and end may be omitted independently to use the available waveform bounds.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Query and filter stream transfers, stalls, and packets.
x-how_it_works: 无 sop/eop 时按 transfer 在线过滤；packet stream 必须用 filter.position=sop/eop 选择边界拍并返回整包。
x-when_to_use: 按多个 data/beat/stable 字段筛选流事务。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: stream, query; filter.fields conditions AND; each mode exact/range/mask; packet filter requires position sop/eop
x-description-zh: 查询并按多个字段过滤 stream transfer 或 packet。

use_when: 已加载通用 stream 配置，需要查询 transfer、stall、packet 或字段。
do_not_use_when: 接口是 AXI/APB 且需要其标准专用语义。

alternatives.when: 只需一次性表达式找点。

constraints: required: stream, query; filter.fields conditions AND; each mode exact/range/mask; packet filter requires position sop/eop
